lines.speaker: Meegle
lines.text: Well, they're supposed to look terrifying but I think they are rather cute.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sure they are cute, unless they are biting your arm off.

lines.speaker: Meegle
lines.text: Oh they'd never do that - unless I tell them to, of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better stay on your good side then!

lines.speaker: Meegle
lines.text: Ah, just in time for a break. Thank you.
